title: esenbeckia berlandieri subsp. litoralis
intro: Esenbeckia berlandieri subsp. litoralis, also known as coastal yellow berlandier buttonbush, is a shrub native to the Gulf Coast of the United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its bioactive compounds like limonoids and flavonoids. Esenbeckia berlandieri subsp. litoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
